original_image_tags: A typed memorandum on aged paper with punch holes at the top. A faint blue stamp reads "COPY" in the upper right corner.

elements.description: A typed memorandum page with 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps at the top and bottom, a 'COPY' stamp at the top right, and handwritten annotations. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Description B claims handwritten annotations are present while Description A does not, and they disagree on the presence of 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps versus only a 'COPY' stamp, indicating contradictory visual content.
